steps.title: State the salinity cause
steps.content: The student wants to explain why brine pools are toxic to most sea life. The relevant notes link the toxicity directly to extreme saltiness: brine pools are three to eight times saltier than the surrounding ocean.

steps.title: Exclude noncausal details
steps.content: A notes that some bacteria survive but does not explain the cause of toxicity. C combines toxicity with discovery date, not cause. D defines brine pools but does not explain their toxic effect. The answer is B.
